query:
SELECT 
  s.id, 
  s.name,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM restaurants r WHERE r.streetId = s.id AND r.isAcceptingOrders = 1) + 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM googlePlaceRestaurants g WHERE g.streetId = s.id AND g.isActive = 1) as restaurantCount
FROM streets s
WHERE s.cityId = 1
ORDER BY s.sortOrder, s.name
